direction: reuse freshly computed KLAS1 FLR0 locally on the KLAS1-index parent
rationale: CalculateKlas1 stores FLR(0) as HB1 * URB and immediately reads the same macro-backed sides.FLUX0[idx] value to form FLR(1). Keeping the freshly computed flux0 in a local register removes that read-back while preserving the same multiplication operands and order.
